title: Echoes of The End ( Structures)
description: Adds 9 New Structures To The End. Is This The End? ( Vanilla Blocks Only )
body:
![end version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f1e501d96bb611853a94a1f2c9c7ddca1772f98.png)
Echoes of the End is a mod that expands the End with new structures. (Total: 8) Echoes of The End dramatically overhauls exploration in the outer reaches by introducing 8 brand new, unique structures to discover across the void. Venture beyond the islands and encounter the remnants of ancient travelers, the strongholds of forgotten denizens, and breathtaking celestial ruins.

![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4933297dd698ccf2a1ad86463e67e8f4ab365df_0.webp)

Explore Crying Obsidian Tower & End Dungeon Tower & End Enchanted Temple & End Pillar & End Shulker Tower & End Temple & End Warship & End Well. 

![end ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a16505b6e7a74cfc610d3e1428126a617f3163.png)
![mod info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131615656a08efdcffdde000250c4e2e23fab38c.png)
Using a complete end overhaul may block the structures.
All loot chests can be used with the lootr mod.
We will release a nether version soon!

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f83f25875de1428ea1681c0e337f86aef2bf2b9.png)

![dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63b4db694d686a4742aacce53b81c6c43fa14fda.png)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
